LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT TRADEHILL, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. OVERRULED IN ITS ENTIRETY. THE COMPLAINT STATES FACTS SUFFICIENT TO CONSTITUTE A CAUSE OF ACTION AND THERE IS NO MISJOINDER OF PARTIES. (CCP 430.10(E) AND 430.10(E). PRE-INCORPORATION CONTRACTS ARE ENFORCEABLE. THE COMPLAINT MAKES CLEAR THAT THE CONTRACT IS WRITTEN. SEE PARAGRAPH 39. (CCP 430.10(G). FINALLY, AS TO THE DEMURRER TO THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES THE TERMS OF THE CONTRACT ACCORDING TO THEIR LEGAL EFFECT. IF PLAINTIFF SEEKS TO NAME DOE DEFENDANTS, PLAINTIFF SHALL MAKE A FORMAL EX PARTE APPLICATION AND PRESENT IT TO DEPARTMENT 302, PURSUANT TO CCP 474. THE COURT SIGNED THE ORDER THAT WAS SUBMITTED BY EMAIL. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2018 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-23-2015 Set For Trial On Jul-11-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Tradehill, Inc. Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Answers And Production To Discovery Requests And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-07-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

There being no appearance by any party or counsel, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Tradehill, Inc.'s Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Answers And Production To Discovery Requests And For Monetary Sanctions is taken off calendar at the request of the moving party. Judge Pro Tem: Naomi Jane Gray, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Motion And Notice Of Hearing For Motion To Compel Arbitration Or, In The Alternative, Demurrer
Off Calendar Dec-17-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JERED KENNA'S Motion To Compel Arbitration Or, In The Alternative, Demurrer is off calendar per stipulation of the parties. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-25-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2014 Continued To Sep-10-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-21-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT TRADEHILL, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled in its entirety. The Complaint states facts sufficient to constitute a cause of action and there is no misjoinder of parties. (CCP 430.10(e) and 430.10(e). Pre-incorporation contracts are enforceable. The Complaint makes clear that the contract is written. See Paragraph 39. (CCP 430.10(g). Finally, as to the demurrer to the fourth cause of action, Plaintiff sufficiently alleges the terms of the contract according to their legal effect. If Plaintiff seeks to name Doe defendants, Plaintiff shall make a formal ex parte application and present it to Department 302, pursuant to CCP 474. The Court signed the Order that was submitted by email. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
